title: Multilingual Cotton Leaf Disease Detection System
description: Developed a CNN-based smart web application to detect cotton leaf diseases from uploaded images. The system provides multilingual disease information, pesticide recommendations, disease lifecycle details, and text-to-speech voice support in English, Kannada, and Hindi.

title: Melanoma Stage Detection System
description: Built a machine learning-based web application that classifies melanoma stages from skin lesion images using image preprocessing and prediction techniques for early diagnosis support.

title: Crop Yield AI – Smart Farming Prediction System
description: Developed a Machine Learning based smart farming application that predicts crop yield using agricultural and environmental parameters. The system includes authentication, real-time prediction, data visualization, and multiple machine learning algorithms.

title: TinyTreasure – Online Gift Shop Management System
description: Developed a complete online gift shopping website with user authentication, product management, shopping cart, checkout, order management, and MySQL database integration.

title: Resume Eligibility Checker (Mini ATS System)
description: Developed a Java Swing desktop application that compares candidate resumes with company job requirements, calculates eligibility scores, identifies missing skills, and supports multiple company selection.
